query: Quick heads up I am upstairs folding laundry and want the living room comfortable for when people come down. Kick on the living room fan 1 at 60% 20 minutes from now and bump it to 70% 5 minutes after the previous action. Start the living room AC 1 on cooling with its fan at 60% 14 minutes from now and raise its fan to 70% 27 minutes after the previous action so I do not have to run downstairs to tweak anything.

steps.thought: I need to verify the device IDs and their capabilities for the living room fan and AC before scheduling the actions. I will first retrieve the devices in the living room.
I need to check the device structure for living_room_fan_1 to find the correct cluster and attribute/command for setting fan speed.
I need to check the device structure for living_room_air_conditioner_1 to find the correct clusters and commands/attributes for setting cooling mode and fan speed.
I will schedule the first action: starting the AC on cooling with fan at 60% at 11:13:13 (14 minutes from now). I'll use write_attribute to set SystemMode to 3 (cooling) and PercentSetting to 60.
I have already scheduled the AC start at 11:13:13. Now I will schedule the first fan action: turning on living_room_fan_1 and setting it to 60% at 11:19:13 (20 minutes from now).
I have scheduled the AC start at 11:13:13 and the fan start at 11:19:13. Now I will schedule the fan bump to 70% at 11:24:13 (5 minutes after the fan start).

I have scheduled the AC start at 11:13:13, the fan start at 11:19:13, and the fan bump to 70% at 11:24:13. Now I will schedule the final action: raising the AC fan to 70% at 11:40:13 (27 minutes after the AC start).
All four scheduled workflows have been successfully created. I will now finish the task and provide a summary to the user.

action_input.answer:
I've scheduled all your requests for the living room:
- AC 1 will start on cooling with the fan at 60% at 11:13 AM (14 minutes from now).
- Fan 1 will turn on at 60% at 11:19 AM (20 minutes from now).
- Fan 1 will increase to 70% at 11:24 AM (5 minutes after it starts).
- AC 1 fan will increase to 70% at 11:40 AM (27 minutes after it starts).
Everything is set so you don't have to run downstairs!
